notes: 0.7.0 shipped casp-help: casp help is first-class (exit 0, was unknown-command exit 1); casp help <command> and casp <command> --help print a focused per-command block (why/usage/flags/examples) for all 11 verbs, byte-identical via both entry points; top-level help gains a THE LOOP section; unknown commands degrade gracefully (named miss + valid-command list + exit 1). Per-command help renders from one structured registry (src/help.ts) — no LLM, no network. 63 tests green (9 new). Tooling ergonomics only; casp check semantics unchanged. Read-only audit ran before close: GO, no required fixes. Next is positioning-deterministic-floor (multi-repo copy — settle wording in private-docs before propagating). check-shipped-log (verdict-changing) follows. Session logs are technical-only by policy (casp-sh CLAUDE.md s3). Run node dist/cli.js check before push.
